data_preparation.pipeline¶

Data preparation pipeline.

This module provides a pipeline that dispatches to specific data preparation steps based on hydra configuration.

Supported steps:

  • weather_labeling

  • highway_labeling

  • preparation

class data_preparation.pipeline.DataPreparationPipeline(cfg)[source]¶

Bases: object

Top-level pipeline for dispatching data preparation tasks.

Reads cfg.data_preparation.name to select and execute exactly one preparation stage. Each stage is self-contained and produces outputs consumed by downstream pipelines.

cfg¶

Hydra configuration object containing all data preparation settings.

Example

>>> pipeline = DataPreparationPipeline(cfg)
>>> pipeline.run()
run()[source]¶

Executes the configured data preparation step.

Dispatches to the corresponding module based on cfg.data_preparation.name.

Raises:

ValueError – If cfg.data_preparation.name does not match any supported step.
